project_info.name: AI Parallel Systems Demo
project_info.description: Example project showing parallel AI task execution

tasks.title: Implement User Authentication
tasks.prompt: Create a complete user authentication system with JWT tokens. Include login, logout, register endpoints with proper password hashing and token validation middleware.

tasks.title: Create REST API CRUD Operations
tasks.prompt: Implement full CRUD operations for user management with proper validation, error handling, and documentation. Include endpoints for create, read, update, delete users.

tasks.title: Setup Database Schema and Migrations
tasks.prompt: Create database schema, migrations, and models for users table. Include proper indexing, constraints, and seed data for development.

tasks.title: Build React Frontend Components
tasks.prompt: Create responsive React components for user authentication forms (login, register), user dashboard, and navigation. Use modern React hooks and proper state management.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing Suite
tasks.prompt: Create unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests for all authentication and API functionality. Include test fixtures and proper test database setup.

tasks.title: Performance Optimization
tasks.prompt: Analyze and optimize application performance. Implement caching strategies, database query optimization, and code splitting for better performance.

tasks.title: API Documentation
tasks.prompt: Generate comprehensive API documentation using OpenAPI/Swagger. Include request/response examples, authentication details, and error codes.

tasks.title: Deployment Configuration
tasks.prompt: Create Docker configuration, CI/CD pipeline, and deployment scripts for production. Include environment variable management and health checks.

tasks.title: Global Error Handling System
tasks.prompt: Implement centralized error handling middleware with proper logging, error codes, and user-friendly error messages. Include error monitoring and alerting.

tasks.title: Input Validation Layer
tasks.prompt: Create comprehensive input validation system using schemas. Validate all user inputs, API parameters, and data types with proper error messages.

tasks.title: Security Headers and CORS
tasks.prompt: Implement security best practices including CORS configuration, security headers, rate limiting, and input sanitization to prevent common attacks.
